hero.eyebrow: Investment Counsellor, CFA · Moscow · Open to relocation
hero.headline: Private banking, wealth management, and investment advisory for HNW & UHNW clients.
hero.body: 14+ years across Citi and Gazprombank, building portfolio-based advice across global fixed income, equities, structured notes, and alternatives.
about.label: About
about.headline: A career across private banking, wealth management, and investment advisory.
about.p1: I currently serve as Executive Director, Investment Counsellor at Gazprombank Private Banking, building portfolio-based advice across global fixed income, equities, structured notes, deposits, and alternatives. Prior to that, I spent more than a decade at Citi — most recently as Vice President and Head of Portfolio Counsellors & Analytics for Russia.
about.p2: I work with relationship managers on portfolio reviews, rebalancing decisions, and tactical asset-allocation tilts; deliver market updates and internal trainings; and contribute to recommended-product platform and advisory-workflow initiatives. I hold the CFA Charter and am a member of the American Finance Association.
research.label: Research prototypes
research.headline: Two personal research projects on rules-based equity index design.
research.disclaimer: RHIX and RITIX are personal research prototypes maintained outside of professional capacity. They are not investment products, not regulated benchmarks, and not affiliated with any employer. Levels and constituent histories are published here for research and educational purposes only.
rhix.headline: Healthcare & biotech sector concept.
rhix.body: A free-float market-cap weighted index concept covering core healthcare, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology issuers listed on the Moscow Exchange.
ritix.headline: Russian technology sector concept.
ritix.body: A square-root free-float-adjusted market-cap weighted index concept covering ten Russian IT issuers on the Moscow Exchange.
contact.headline: Open to conversations on investment advisory and portfolio counsellor roles.
contact.reply: Replies typically within 48 hours. For role-specific enquiries, please include the position or institution in the subject line.
footer.disclaimer: RHIX · RITIX are personal research prototypes — not investment advice
